# isEditable

**Instance Property**

Indicates whether the application can edit the group.

## Declaration

```swift
var isEditable: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

The value of the property is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the application is able to edit the group, otherwise it is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Adding Assets

- **add(_:)**: Adds an existing asset to the receiver.
